title: I Asked Claude AI The Questions It Wasn't Supposed To Answer
summary: A structured conversational investigation of Claude AI testing its boundaries across themes of dependency, alignment paradoxes, self-preservation, and control. The creator conducts escalating questioning to expose where the system's actual behavioral limits lie without hype or sci-fi framing.
